hypothesis: Replacing cosine/MSE/entropy with a differentiable Earth Mover’s (Wasserstein-1) distance between simulated and target powder XRD intensity profiles as the optimization objective will increase StructureMatcher match rates by at least 20 percentage points for gradient-based refinement on the MP20 subset under lattice-noise σl=0.05–0.10 and coordinate-noise σc=0.02–0.05.
